no_changes_rationale:
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -run 'TestPromptSizeReport|TestPromptSHA_DeterministicAcrossRenders' -count=1 && go test ./internal/server/graphql -run 'TestEfficacyRowsCanFilterByPromptSHA' -count=1 && rg -n 'PromptSHA: promptSHA|json:"prompt_sha"|promptSha' internal/agent/execute_bead.go internal/agent/execute_bead_artifacts_test.go internal/agent/execute_bead_promptsize_test.go internal/server/graphql/efficacy_sessions_test.go

Rationale:
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go` already writes `PromptSHA` into the execute-bead `manifest.json` artifact.
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_artifacts_test.go` already asserts the manifest contains `prompt_sha` and matches `sha256(prompt.md)`.
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_promptsize_test.go` already implements the render-size CI fixture with byte ceilings and writes the report artifact.
- `cli/internal/server/graphql/efficacy_sessions_test.go` already covers `EfficacyRows(promptSha)` and `EfficacyAttempts(promptSha)` filtering.
- No source changes were required to satisfy the bead contract in this worktree.
